affected_files.change: ReadSegment body replaced to delegate to readSegmentFrom(path, 0); doc comments on ReadSegment and parseSegmentRecords updated to describe the new call chain.
readSegmentFrom doc comment updated to describe that ReadSegment now wraps it (was previously described as an independent sibling).

dependents.usage: content_test.go calls wal.ReadSegment directly to observe durable records
edge_append.go and edgelog.go call wal.ReadSegment in production code paths

public_contract.ReadSegment: func ReadSegment(path string) ([][]byte, error) - signature, return semantics (torn tail => nil err with records-so-far; CRC mismatch => hard err with records-so-far), and error message text ("wal: reading segment %s: %w", "wal: segment %s: %w") all preserved exactly.

risk_rationale: Pure internal delegation refactor within a single package; no signature change; no error-message change; no test file changes required for the refactor itself; existing test suite (writer_test.go, recovery_test.go, record_test.go, crash_subprocess_test.go) already exercises ReadSegment through its unchanged public contract and passes unmodified, plus downstream packages (catalog/graph/mvcc) that call wal.ReadSegment pass unmodified.
